auc:Building.auc:PremisesNotes: Energy usage is modeled and calibrated with available utility data, in alignment with ASHRAE standards and the intent of BPI-2400 standard, to accurately represent building energy use and loads. Energy savings were generated using Energy Plus simulations via the DOE Asset Score platform and Open Studio.
